title: Spicy Saudi Turkey Mince Crumble
description: A quick-fix spicy Saudi Arabian dish featuring dairy-free turkey mince, marinated and crumbled for a crispy texture.

ingredients.name: Chopped Fresh Herbs (such as parsley, cilantro)
Cornstarch or Tapioca Starch for Crumbling
Vegetable Oil for Crumbling and Cooking

instructions: Marinate the turkey mince with garlic powder, red pepper flakes, dijon mustard, olive oil, salt, and black pepper in a bowl for at least 30 minutes.
Combine cornstarch or tapioca starch with vegetable oil until it forms a smooth paste.

Stir the marinated mince into the cornstarch and oil mixture. Press the mixture gently onto a non-stick surface to form small crumbles, ensuring not to compact too much as this will prevent crispy texture.
Place the crumbled mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake in the preheated oven for 10-15 minutes or until golden and crisp.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs before serving.
